flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Anderson University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.7k → $35.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Anderson University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.7k → $35.0k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Anderson University are 0% above 6-year earnings ($42.1k → $42.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Anderson University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
